explanations.26: This checks if src is a string AND starts with a forward slash; if both are true, we pass it through useBaseUrl to fix the path for Docusaurus, otherwise we use src as-is.
explanations.32: If no alt text is provided, we fall back to using the title as alt text so the image still has accessibility text for screen readers.
explanations.38: The src prop can be either a string or an object, and it's required—this is a broader type than just a string, so check your usage if you're passing objects.
